My Little Pony: The Movie (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $21,885,107Details
International Box Office $39,409,537
Worldwide Box Office $61,294,644
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,971,313
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,967,654
Total $9,938,967
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A dark force threatens Ponyville, and the Mane 6—Twilight Sparkle, Applejack, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy, and Rarity— embark on an unforgettable journey beyond Equestria where they meet new friends and exciting challenges on a quest to use the magic of friendship to save their home.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,885,899 (40.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,500,000 (worldwide box office is 9.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,528 opening theaters/2,528 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,180,140

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 6th, 2017 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: September 29th, 2017 (Special Engagement), released as Mano mažasis ponis (Lithuania)
October 5th, 2017 (Wide) (Israel)
October 6th, 2017 (Wide) (Mexico)
October 6th, 2017 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 6th, 2017 (Wide) (Taiwan)
Video Release: December 19th, 2017 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for mild action.
(Rating bulletin 2487 (Cert #51120), 8/2/2017)
Running Time: 99 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Plot point: Dragon, Mermaids, Military Coup, Monster, Pirates, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Toy
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Allspark Pictures, DHX Media
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English
